calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, S. Wong #11288.
Petitioner GLENDA FIDELINA ROSA RODRIGUEZ was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. The petitioner did not have California identification to verify proof of residency in San Francisco. The Court accepted as proof of petitioner's residency, a Bank of America credit card bill with her name and address shown as Glenda Rosa, 231 Brookdale Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to GLENDA FIDELINA TRIGUERES.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
